zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Grey於大約1335年出生在英國賀福爾維爾頓時，她的父親Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton25歲，母親Maud de Botetourt21歲。她與Robert de Clifton II在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Grey于大约1335年出生在英国賀福爾維爾頓时，她的父亲Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton25岁，母亲Maud de Botetourt21岁。她与Robert de Clifton II在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1367年在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Grey was born about 1335, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, her father, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, was 25 and her mother, Maud de Botetourt, was 21. She married Robert de Clifton II in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1367, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Grey est née environ 1335, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maud de Botetourt, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Clifton II à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1367, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Grey um 1335 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton 25 und ihre Mutter Maud de Botetourt 21. Sie hat in England, United Kingdom Robert de Clifton II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1367 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Grey è nata il circa 1335 nel Wilton, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Maud de Botetourt, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Clifton II nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1367, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Greyが約1335年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wiltonは25歳，母Maud de Botetourtは21歳であった。イギリスイギリスでRobert de Clifton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1367年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Grey(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Botetourt(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Robert de Clifton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: Ravensworth, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Botetourt, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Clifton II em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1367, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Grey родилась около 1335 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Botetourt, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Clifton II в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1367 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Grey nació aproximadamente 1335, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Maud de Botetourt, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Robert de Clifton II en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1367, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
